# libui

<!-- BEGIN:description — Do not edit. Generated from package.json. -->

Agent-friendly web surfaces — share handler logic across web and terminal so
capabilities ship once, not twice.

<!-- END:description -->

## Getting Started

```js
import { createElement, div, h1, render, createRouter } from '@forwardimpact/libui';
import { createReactive, bind } from '@forwardimpact/libui';
```
